throughline: The AI-stock wobble broadened into a global risk-off — the crack spreading from one name to the whole complex and across to Asia — even as the oil-and-rates vise tightens into a live hold-vs-hike Fed and the physical AI-power build roars on regardless.
explainers: why a capacity auction clearing at its price cap is a broken new-build signal
co-located behind-the-meter gas and FERC's cross-RTO large-load rulemaking
the integrated power+shell+ops data-center lease model vs standalone colo
why hold-vs-hike (not hold-vs-cut) is the Fed frame when oil reverses disinflation
comment: stories = every distinct item covered (short slugs); explainers = concepts actually explained so we don't re-explain. Iran/Hormuz advanced only as the oil driver inside Market Overview, not re-run as a standalone world headline.
